programmes.show_description: Remake of the 1950 neo noir thriller, with Dennis Quaid. A professor accused of murdering his wife's lover is given a slow-acting poison and has 24 hours to find his would-be killer. (1988)

Steven Soderbergh's romantic crime drama with George Clooney. A US Marshal pursues a charming thief preparing for a final job, but as the chase intensifies, so do their feelings for each other. (1998)
Legend returns soon.
Put the pleasure back into shopping from the comfort of your home and choose from a selection of innovative products.
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Trivette's old girlfriend get his help to locate her father, and then kills him. S5, Ep21
As the team face a firing squad, General Stockwell drives a hard bargain in return for giving the nod to a rescue attempt. S5, Ep3
An Invader courier takes delivery of a briefcase full of alien spores, but is soon involved in an accident that draws Vincent's attention. Guest starring Gene Hackman.
Monstrous marine mayhem. Following a tsunami, Malibu is flooded and a ferocious pack of prehistoric goblin sharks appear from the murky depths to hunt for their next bikini-clad meal. (2009)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Western with Charlton Heston. A white man raised by the Sioux after his family were killed by Crow warriors finds his loyalties tested in later life. (1952)
Western sequel, with Warren Oates taking over the iconic role. Old West Marshal 'True Grit' Rooster Cogburn escorts a teenage girl on a mission to change him. (1978)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Security is stepped up on board the Enterprise in anticipation of a visit from a Medusan ambassador whose appearance can blind any onlookers. S3, Ep5/24
After an Invader collapses and an ambulance is called, the medics are killed and the sick alien is swiped - but not before a bystander overhears something potentially revealing.
Posing as part of a touring football squad, the team go behind the Iron Curtain to free an East German scientist who wants to defect to the West. S5, Ep4
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. Roscoe Jones, the minister who replaced Trent's father, is targeted by a former military comrade. S5, Ep22
Sci-fi sequel with Vin Diesel. A fugitive abandoned on a deadly alien planet lures bounty hunters there in a plot to escape, but is forced to work with them against an attack by the monsters. (2013)
80s' sci-fi. When Nada finds a pair of sunglasses that reveal the truth about the world when he wears them, he discovers the streets of LA are full of aliens hell bent on world domination. (1988)
Thriller with Bruce Willis. Three Midwestern brothers, a crime lord, and an incorruptible cop are on a deadly collision course when the youngest brother's fiancée is kidnapped by traffickers. (2018)
High-octane WWII action with Luke Goss. A disgraced army captain has a shot at redemption when he's asked to lead a unit on a secret mission behind enemy lines to capture a Nazi super-weapon. (2015)
Legend returns soon.

Apocalyptic action. After a series of massive solar storms causes widespread destruction, one family must travel through floods, tsunamis and volcanic eruptions to reach safety. (2018)

Fact-based WWII spy adventure with Christopher Plummer. Bank robber Eddie Chapman is recruited by the Nazis, and then becomes a British double agent in exchange for money and a full pardon. (1967)
Tense Western drama. A US Marshal is sent to the town of Dogwood Pass to catch a ruthless killer, where a corrupt mayor and an unhinged sheriff stand in the way of justice. (2017)
The Enterprise ignores a hostile alien warning. Captain Kirk ends up sentenced to death and is forced to take part in an OK Corral-style gunfight. S3, Ep6/24
The Invaders implement a plot to raise the radiation on Earth to dangerous levels and then claim to be mankind's saviours by offering an antidote to the effects.
The outbreak of a revolution interferes with the gang's plans to rescue three American agents from a Third World country. S5, Ep5
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. A paroled safe-cracker is approached to join a new gang, but tells Walker and hatches a plan... S5, Ep23
Thriller with Russell Crowe. A journalist investigates a connection between the murder of a congressman's intern and the death of a petty crook and uncovers a political conspiracy. (2009)
Crime thriller with Liam Hemsworth. A security guard is dragged into helping his friend with a heist that ends up being the biggest armoured car robbery in US history. (2013)
